issue.message: Overriding method should call `super.onBackPressed`
Overriding method should call `super.onBackPressed`
`onBackPressed` is no longer called for back gestures; migrate to AndroidX's backward compatible `OnBackPressedDispatcher`
`onBackPressed` is no longer called for back gestures; migrate to AndroidX's backward compatible `OnBackPressedDispatcher`
Consider using `apply()` instead; `commit` writes its data to persistent storage immediately, whereas `apply` will handle it in the background
Consider using `apply()` instead; `commit` writes its data to persistent storage immediately, whereas `apply` will handle it in the background
Consider using `apply()` instead; `commit` writes its data to persistent storage immediately, whereas `apply` will handle it in the background
Consider using `apply()` instead; `commit` writes its data to persistent storage immediately, whereas `apply` will handle it in the background
Implicitly using the default locale is a common source of bugs: Use `String.format(Locale, ...)` instead
Implicitly using the default locale is a common source of bugs: Use `String.format(Locale, ...)` instead
Implicitly using the default locale is a common source of bugs: Use `String.format(Locale, ...)` instead
Attribute `localeConfig` is only used in API level 33 and higher (current min is 26)
Attribute `turnScreenOn` is only used in API level 27 and higher (current min is 26)
Attribute `turnScreenOn` is only used in API level 27 and higher (current min is 26)
Attribute `targetCellWidth` is only used in API level 31 and higher (current min is 26)
Attribute `targetCellHeight` is only used in API level 31 and higher (current min is 26)
Attribute `previewLayout` is only used in API level 31 and higher (current min is 26)
Attribute `targetCellWidth` is only used in API level 31 and higher (current min is 26)
Attribute `targetCellHeight` is only used in API level 31 and higher (current min is 26)
Attribute `previewLayout` is only used in API level 31 and higher (current min is 26)
Attribute `targetCellWidth` is only used in API level 31 and higher (current min is 26)
Attribute `targetCellHeight` is only used in API level 31 and higher (current min is 26)
Attribute `previewLayout` is only used in API level 31 and higher (current min is 26)
Attribute `targetCellWidth` is only used in API level 31 and higher (current min is 26)
Attribute `targetCellHeight` is only used in API level 31 and higher (current min is 26)
Attribute `previewLayout` is only used in API level 31 and higher (current min is 26)
Reading locale in a non-observable way in a composable function
Reading locale in a non-observable way in a composable function
A newer version of Gradle than 8.14.4 is available: 8.14.5
A newer version of androidx.core:core-ktx than 1.18.0 is available: 1.19.0
A newer version of androidx.datastore:datastore-preferences than 1.1.1 is available: 1.2.1
A newer version of androidx.sqlite:sqlite than 2.6.2 is available: 2.7.0

A newer version of androidx.lifecycle:lifecycle-runtime-compose than 2.10.0 is available: 2.11.0
A newer version of androidx.lifecycle:lifecycle-process than 2.10.0 is available: 2.11.0
A newer version of com.google.firebase:firebase-bom than 34.14.1 is available: 34.15.0
A newer version of com.google.mediapipe:tasks-audio than 0.10.21 is available: 0.20230731
A newer version of com.google.mediapipe:tasks-vision than 0.10.21 is available: 0.20230731
A newer version of com.squareup.retrofit2:retrofit than 2.11.0 is available: 3.0.0
A newer version of com.squareup.retrofit2:converter-gson than 2.11.0 is available: 3.0.0
A newer version of com.patrykandpatrick.vico:compose-m3 than 2.0.0-beta.3 is available: 3.2.3
Modifier parameter should be the first optional parameter
The native library `arm64-v8a/libmediapipe_tasks_audio_jni.so` (from `com.google.mediapipe:tasks-audio:0.10.21`) is not 16 KB aligned
The native library `arm64-v8a/libmediapipe_tasks_vision_jni.so` (from `com.google.mediapipe:tasks-vision:0.10.21`) is not 16 KB aligned
The native library `arm64-v8a/libmediapipe_tasks_audio_jni.so` (from `com.google.mediapipe:tasks-audio:0.10.21`) is not 16 KB aligned

Formatting %d followed by words ("done"): This should probably be a plural rather than a string
Formatting %d followed by words ("unlocked"): This should probably be a plural rather than a string
Formatting %d followed by words ("left"): This should probably be a plural rather than a string
Unnecessary; `SDK_INT` is always >= 26
Unnecessary; `SDK_INT` is always >= 26
Unnecessary; `SDK_INT` is always >= 26
Unnecessary; `SDK_INT` is always >= 26
This folder configuration (`v26`) is unnecessary; `minSdkVersion` is 26. Merge all the resources in this folder into `mipmap-anydpi`.
Do not place Android context classes in static fields (static reference to `SleepAudioClassifier` which has field `context` pointing to `Context`); this is a memory leak
issue.errorLine1: // §10.x — Static handle to the running classifier so the End Sleep

issue.message: This tag and its children can be replaced by one `<TextView/>` and a compound drawable
issue.errorLine1: <LinearLayout android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:orientation="horizontal" android:gravity="center_vertical" android:paddingTop="3dp" android:paddingBottom="3dp">

Prefer `mutableIntStateOf` instead of `mutableStateOf`

The resource `R.layout.widget_focus_chronometer` appears to be unused

Add suffix `-ktx` to enable the Kotlin extensions for this library
Assigning `Locale.getDefault()` to a final static field is suspicious; this code will not work correctly if the user changes locale while the app is running
issue.errorLine1: private val CLOCK = DateTimeFormatter.ofPattern("h:mm a", Locale.getDefault())

issue.message: Hardcoded string "Next up", should use `@string` resource
issue.errorLine1: <TextView android:layout_width="wrap_content" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:layout_marginBottom="6dp" android:text="Next up" android:textColor="@color/widget_text" android:textSize="15sp" android:textStyle="bold" />

issue.message: Hardcoded string "2:00 PM", should use `@string` resource
issue.errorLine1: <TextView android:layout_width="76dp" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:text="2:00 PM" android:textColor="@color/widget_accent" android:textSize="13sp" android:textStyle="bold" />

issue.message: Hardcoded string "Study block", should use `@string` resource
issue.errorLine1: <TextView android:layout_width="0dp" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:layout_weight="1" android:maxLines="1" android:text="Study block" android:textColor="@color/widget_text" android:textSize="14sp" />

issue.message: Hardcoded string "4:30 PM", should use `@string` resource
issue.errorLine1: <TextView android:layout_width="76dp" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:text="4:30 PM" android:textColor="@color/widget_accent" android:textSize="13sp" android:textStyle="bold" />

Hardcoded string "😴 Last night", should use `@string` resource
The language `in` (Indonesian) is present in this project, but not declared in the localeConfig resource
